question.text: Within what period from the end of the financial year must the Manager of a REIT submit the annual report to unit holders and stock exchanges?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, the manager shall submit an annual report to all unit holders electronically or by physical copies and to the designated stock exchanges within 3 months from the end of the financial year. **The Trap:** 60 days is the timeline for submitting audited annual financial information to stock exchanges. 45 days is for half-yearly financial information. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Annual report = 3 months; Annual audited financials = 60 days; Half-yearly financials = 45 days. These are three different deadlines for different types of disclosures.
